summary: Verified Home page on deployed URL: 'Our Clients' section fully removed, 'Trusted across industries' neo-card marquee is rendered with all 10 industries (including Perfume + Mobile Phones), icons + labels present, no client brand names anywhere on Home.
critical_code_review_comments: CLIENTS array still exported from /app/frontend/src/lib/data.js though unused on Home. Safe to keep, but consider removing if no other page uses it to prevent accidental reuse.
Home.jsx imports many lucide-react icons in a single line; consider tree-shaking review, but not blocking.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Home page verified on deployed URL https://pacfully-showcase.preview.emergentagent.com/. clients-section/clients-marquee absent (both DOM and text). industries-section + industries-marquee present with 20 industry-card-* pills (10 unique doubled for marquee loop). All 10 required industry labels detected inside data-testid='industries-marquee'. First card confirmed to be a neo-card rounded-2xl pill with an svg icon. Headline 'Packaging engineered for every category.' visible. No forbidden brand names on Home. User may have been seeing a stale browser cache — no code fix needed.
rca of the issue: User reported still seeing 'Our Clients' section. Live DOM inspection confirms code is already correctly deployed: clients JSX is removed and industries neo-card marquee renders as expected. RCA: likely user browser cache. Recommend the user do a hard reload (Ctrl/Cmd+Shift+R) or clear site data. No developer action required.
